'''Orr Agg R'orr''' was a [[Tusken/Legends|Tusken]] who served the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]] and was known for sniping and disabling [[Teemto Pagalies' Podracer/Legends|Teemto Pagalies' Podracer]] at the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Later that year, bounty hunter [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] hunted down and killed the Tusken Raider, who had a bounty of 3000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on his head posted by the Pagalies Family.
